CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Groovy Collectibles, LLC's motion for summary judgment.
Dept. 220, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Early K. Langley, #3537.

Daniel J. Kelly, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Groovy Collectibles, LLC.
Robert Cross, Esq. appered with defendant Amelia Davis, as administrator of the Estate of James Marshall.

After hearing argument by counsel, and good cause appearing, defendant's motion for summary judgment is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part.

Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment as to the first cause of action, breach of contract of the 2009 professional services agreement, is DENIED. Plaintiff has not met its burden of proof. The terms of the contract are ambiguous regarding involuntary transfer by death. The Court overrules plaintiff's objections to the Davis & Swilling declarations.

Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment as to the secon & third causes of action, breach of contract - site maintenance agreement, and breach of contract of the 2010 professional services agreement, respectively, is GRANTED. Plaintiff has met its burden of proof. There are triable issues of fact as to these two causes of action.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the Order After Hearing and submit same to the Court for review.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2011 Continued To Nov-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF GROOVY COLLECTIBLES LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - The motion will be heard by Judge James McBride in department 220 at 9am on November 16, 2011. The court will not provide a court reporter. If any party desires a court reporter, all parties are required to meet and confer to agree on a single court reporter. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
